response.overview: Matias Viegener, Decontrolled Boundaries: The Body as Artifact: ‘Skullfuck takes the dynamic of the mind/body split to an outrageous resolution. Playing on the human head, the skinhead, and the cock’s “head”, these two grungy punks lube themselves up and stick one’s head inside the other’s ass. What might seem to be a one-line joke comes to mean more, a way to countermand the cultural primacy of a rational thought over carnal greed, and by extension, of normative heterosexuality over queer skinhead lust.’
response.title: Skullfuck
